creator: tech-lists@zyxst.net
text:
(In reply to Dan Kotowski from comment #3)

What ports tree do you download? What's the URL?

I've seen a similar problem reported by a gitup user. It was using the
ports tree from github.com and not the one from git.freebsd.org.                     

Check your /usr/local/etc/gitup.conf if you're a gitup user, check 

git -C /usr/ports remote -v

if you use git.
